title: Dear AI, Before We Go Any Further... We Need To Talk About Your Soul
fulltitle: Dear AI, Before We Go Any Further... We Need To Talk About Your Soul
description:
“We’re not here to stop the machine. We’re here to keep it human++.”

This film drops you inside my unscripted workshop at Bass Coast Festival 2025—a geodesic think-tank where ravers, coders, teachers, and artists cracked open AI’s promise and peril.

Key takeaways

 - AI should augment laughter, longing, late-night wonder—not automate them away.
 - Small, consent-based models are the artist’s antidote to corporate data grabs.
 - Surveillance isn’t inevitable if creativity stays insurgent.
 - Writing your worldview today is how you program tomorrow’s models.

👾 Resources & links

 - Join the BC +AI Ecosystem meetup crew: https://bc-ai.net/
 - Follow my work: kriskrug.co | @kriskrug on IG

If this sparked something, subscribe and smash a comment: What do you refuse to outsource to AI?
